tests.description: Optimized E2E tests for Story 1.1 - Login, Password Reset, and Profile management. Includes P0 tests for login validation, password reset flow, forced password reset bypass prevention, and P1 test for profile updates.
test_names: [P0-E2E-001] should login successfully with valid credentials and redirect to dashboard
[P0-E2E-002] should show error message with invalid credentials
[P0-E2E-003] should allow user to request password reset
[P0-E2E-004] should allow user to reset password with valid token
[P0-E2E-005] should redirect to change-password when forcePasswordReset is true
[P0-E2E-006] should block navigation to other routes until password is changed
[P0-E2E-007] should allow password change and redirect to dashboard
[P0-E2E-008] should validate password strength on change
[P1-E2E-001] should allow user to update own profile

tests.description: Optimized E2E tests for Story 1.2 - PBAC System. Includes P0 tests for displaying 15 capability checkboxes, assigning capabilities, access control, and admin validation. Includes P1 test for navigation filtering.
test_names: [P0-E2E-020] should display 15 capability checkboxes with Spanish labels
[P0-E2E-021] should have correct data-testid for each capability checkbox
[P0-E2E-023] should create new user with only can_create_failure_report checked by default
[P0-E2E-025] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user
[P0-E2E-028] should deny access to /assets for users without can_manage_assets capability
[P0-E2E-031] should deny access to repair history for users without can_view_repair_history
[P0-E2E-033] should assign all 15 capabilities to initial admin user
[P0-E2E-035] should show only navigation items for user capabilities
[P0-E2E-037] should deny access when accessing unauthorized module via direct URL
[P1-E2E-001] should filter navigation items based on user capabilities

tests.description: Optimized E2E tests for Story 1.3 - Tags System. Includes P0 tests for critical security (tags don't grant capabilities), P1 tests for creating and visualizing tags, and P2 test for 20 tag limit validation.
test_names: [P0-E2E-001] should not grant capabilities when tag is assigned
[P0-E2E-002] should allow same tag with different capabilities
[P0-E2E-003] should preserve capabilities when tag is deleted
[P1-E2E-001] should create tag with name and color
[P1-E2E-002] should display tags as badges in user profile
[P2-E2E-001] should prevent creating more than 20 tags

summary: Generated 3 optimized E2E test files for Epic 1 with 25 total tests covering Story 1.1 (Login/Profile), Story 1.2 (PBAC System), and Story 1.3 (Tags). All tests follow network-first pattern, use resilient selectors, include logging, and avoid hard-coded test data by using factories. Priority coverage: 20 P0 tests, 4 P1 tests, 1 P2 test. Tests are production-ready and follow the existing codebase patterns.

patterns_used.network_first: interceptNetworkCall utility captures API calls before navigation
patterns_used.resilient_selectors: getByRole, getByText, getByTestId for stable element selection
patterns_used.logging: log() function for clear test step documentation
patterns_used.test_data_factories: No hard-coded data - uses createUser, createUserWithCapabilities
